title: OEM and custom manufacturing support
content: We support OEM and custom metal fabrication projects. We can evaluate parts based on drawings, samples, or 3D files before quotation.
quote: We support OEM custom metal parts based on drawings, samples, or 3D files.

title: How to buy bracket and metal products
content: For first-time product consultation, first separate standard products from custom projects, then confirm intended use, key dimensions, material, quantity, surface treatment, and destination country.
quote: 首次购买支架类产品时，应先判断标准品还是定制件，再补充用途、尺寸、材质、数量和目的国。

title: Custom metal brackets
content: We produce brackets for mounting, reinforcement, connection, and structural support in stainless steel, carbon steel, or aluminum.
quote: Brackets for mounting, reinforcement, connection, and structural support are available.

title: Sheet metal housings and enclosures
content: We make sheet metal housings, covers, cabinets, boxes, and enclosures for industrial equipment and electrical assemblies.
quote: Sheet metal housings, covers, cabinets, boxes, and enclosures are part of our product range.

title: Standard product inquiry
content: For standard product inquiries, please provide product name or model, dimensions or specification, quantity, and destination country.
quote: Standard product inquiry usually needs product name or model, specification, quantity, and destination country.

title: Custom stainless steel brackets
content: We can make custom stainless steel brackets and similar sheet metal parts. Please send the drawing, material grade, thickness, quantity, and surface treatment requirement for review.
quote: Custom stainless steel brackets are supported; drawing, material grade, thickness, quantity, and surface treatment are needed for review.

title: Quotation requirements
content: For custom quotation, please provide drawing or sample, product name, material, key dimensions, quantity, surface treatment, tolerance requirement, and destination country.
quote: For custom quotation, please provide product name, drawing or sample, material, dimensions, quantity, and destination country.

title: MOQ policy
content: MOQ depends on part complexity and process. Many custom parts start from about 100 to 500 pieces after drawing review.
quote: MOQ depends on complexity and process; custom parts often start from about 100 to 500 pieces.

title: Supported materials
content: Common materials include stainless steel, carbon steel, aluminum, galvanized steel, brass, and copper.
quote: Common materials include stainless steel, carbon steel, aluminum, galvanized steel, brass, and copper.

title: Sample and production lead time
content: Typical sample lead time is about 7 to 10 working days after technical confirmation. Mass production is commonly 20 to 35 days.
quote: Sample lead time is about 7 to 10 working days; mass production is commonly 20 to 35 days.

title: Shipping methods
content: We can arrange express, air, or sea shipment based on package size, urgency, and destination country.
quote: Express, air, and sea shipment can be arranged based on package size, urgency, and destination country.

title: Unsupported or uncertain product requests
content: If the requested product or process is not covered by internal knowledge, do not promise capability before engineering review. Collect lead details and arrange manual follow-up.
quote: Do not promise unsupported products before engineering review; collect lead details and arrange manual follow-up.
